name: ClosedXML
description: ClosedXML makes it easier for developers to create Excel 2007/2010/2013 files. It provides a nice object oriented way to manipulate the files (similar to VBA) without dealing with the hassles of XML Documents. It can be used by any .NET language like C# and Visual Basic (VB).
authors: Amir Ghezelbash, Francois Botha, Manuel De Leon
